name: do
description: >- Unified router that auto-routes user intent to the right orchestrator or skill. Classifies input by scope, complexity, persistence needs, and parallelism, then dispatches to the cheapest path that can handle it: direct command, skill, marshal, archon, or fleet. Single entry point for all work.
author: SethGammon
summary_zh: 这是一个智能路由调度系统，能自动分析用户意图的复杂度和需求，把任务精准派发给最划算的处理模块，避免大材小用，适合作为多层级系统的统一入口。
